summary: Backend API testing completed successfully. All 28 tests passed for Steel Plant ERP backend including Authentication, Dashboard, Melting, CCM, Rolling Mill, Maintenance, and Admin modules.

minor.issue: Non-blocking warning in passlib about bcrypt version detection (AttributeError: module 'bcrypt' has no attribute '__about__'). Login still works correctly.
